build.beforeDevCommand: bun run sidecar:prepare:dev && bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run sidecar:prepare && bun run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: A local-first desktop interface design tool
bundle.longDescription: Create editable interface designs locally and collaborate with Codex through the bundled Figmaboy MCP server.
